title: pilosocereus piauhyensis
intro: Pilosocereus piauhyensis, also known as Piauhy column, is a species of cactus native to Brazil. It is a type of cactus that has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, such as reducing pain and inflammation, and may be used to treat conditions such as arthritis and skin infections. Pilosocereus piauhyensis is often used to make herbal preparations, including infusions, tinctures, and salves, which can be applied topically to the skin.
